title: [SBW] Combined Perk
description:
Addon for superb warfare mod
Adds the ability to combine perks into a combined perk
body:
# Perk Combiner - SBW Addon

> Not a standalone mod. Requires **Superb Warfare (SBW) 0.8.8 or newer**.

Perk Combiner adds:
- **Combined Perks** (merge perks of the same type)
- **Perk Folders** (store perks of different types in one item)
- **Split system** (separate a folder/combined perk back into individual perks)

---

## 1) Split Perk Folder (Anvil)

1. Leave `Slot 1` empty
2. Put a **Perk Folder** into `Slot 2`
3. Output shows the main split perk
4. Hold **Shift + LMB** on the output slot to extract all split perks

If you do not hold Shift, extraction is blocked and the item returns.

![Splitting a Perk Folder in the anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/eb11e000ff38d18090d3636445ff33696ba78f54.gif)

## 2) Split Combined Perk (Anvil)

1. Leave `Slot 1` empty
2. Put a **Combined Perk** into `Slot 2`
3. Hold **Shift + LMB** on output to extract split perks

![Splitting a Combined Perk in the anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/472d126f1bdbc9127652c208d37c2084bda97077.gif)

---

## 3) Combine Same-Type Perks -> Combined Perk (Anvil)

1. Put the first perk in `Slot 1`
2. Put the second perk of the same type in `Slot 2`
3. Take the **Combined Perk** from output

![Creating a Combined Perk in the anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/dcd2f5fada6b254746c259a74f9970624d3c0d88.gif)

## 4) Combine Different-Type Perks -> Perk Folder (Anvil)

1. Put a perk in `Slot 1`
2. Put a perk of another type in `Slot 2`
3. Take the **Perk Folder** from output

![Combining different perk types into a Perk Folder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/350e5cb1d266c4b2f383935d32f0b10a102fa890.gif)

## 5) Apply Perk Folder to Gun (Anvil)

1. Put your gun in `Slot 1`
2. Put **Perk Folder** in `Slot 2`
3. Take upgraded gun from output

Only **Perk Folder** can be applied to a gun through the anvil.

![Applying a Perk Folder to a gun in the anvil](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/3b6b8bd860100a077e3aa49d8295762fe67e8d91.gif)

## 6) Apply Combined Perk on Reforging Table

1. Place your gun in the **Reforging Table**
2. Put the **Combined Perk** into the matching perk slot
3. Take the upgraded gun

![Applying a Combined Perk on the Reforging Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BGK8soKH/images/7f7da44e8cfd27624aaba5da0c48e9a89bf91d4e.gif)

---

## Requirements

- **Minecraft:** `1.20.1`
- **Forge:** `47.4.16` (only)
- **Superb Warfare (SBW):** `0.8.8+`
